question_text: Question 25: In a testing of hypothesis problem, which one of the following statements is true?

options.A: The probability of the Type-I error cannot be higher than the probability of the Type-II error.
options.B: Type-II error occurs if the test accepts the null hypothesis when the null hypothesis is actually false.
options.C: Type-I error occurs if the test rejects the null hypothesis when the null hypothesis is actually false.
options.D: The sum of the probability of the Type-I error and the probability of the Type-II error should be 1.
